title: Collated marketing collateral list with links and authors

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per marketing collateral asset
summary: A catalog of marketing collateral assets (infographics and white papers), each with its content type, a theme/group (Insurance, Claims, COVID, GDPR, Digital, ...), a topic/title, a URL to the published asset, and the authors. Use it to find published collateral by topic or theme and its link and authors.
use_cases: What collateral exists for a given topic or theme?
What is the URL for a specific piece of collateral?
Who authored a given collateral asset?
Which assets are infographics vs white papers?

examples.Author: Mohit Manchanda | Wayne Reed | Nick Lamb
Mohit Manchanda | Wayne Reed | Nick Lamb

not_answerable.q: How many times has a collateral been viewed or downloaded?

not_answerable.reason: no date column on this sheet
